title: Water Tools
body:
This mod adds 5 new tools that are crafted from water buckets.
They have the same stats as iron tools, but with a water-themed twist!

Features

1. Water Sword
2. Water Pickaxe
3. Water Axe
4. Water Shovel
5. Water Hoe



Tools function exactly like iron tools. Just a fun, lightweight addition for players who want water-themed gear.
